title: Garlic Mashed Cauliflower
instructions:
Fill a large pot with a steamer insert, just below the bottom of the steamer. Bring the water to a boil and add the cauliflower. Cover and cook until tender. About 10 minutes.
In a small frying pan over medium heat cook the garlic in the olive oil until softened. Remove from the heat.
Place half of the cauliflower in a food processor and blend on high until smooth. Add the remaining cauliflower to the processor, a few pieces at a time until all the cauliflower is creamy.
Blend in the garlic, Parmesan, cream cheese, salt and pepper. Serve.
